title: ASSISTANCE FOR OLDER ADULTS - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY SOCIAL SERVICES ASSISTANCE FOR OLDER ADULTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with rent, utilities, water, and prescriptions as funding is available. May also assist with transportation needs. 922 N Central Avenue Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Age 65 and older Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm (541) 773-6965 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 773-6965 Main phone Main phone (541) 773-6965 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-3pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: RVTD bus line 40 Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance * Older Adults Local Automobile Transportation * Older Adults Prescription Expense Assistance * Older Adults Rent Payment Assistance * Older Adults Water Service Payment Assistance * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY MATERIAL GOODS - SALVATION ARMY FAMILY STORE MATERIAL GOODS - SOCIAL SERVICES AND EMERGENCY AID If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY SOCIAL SERVICES
